evals.prompt: Add a chat interface to my Next.js app using the Vercel AI SDK. It should stream responses from Claude (Anthropic), support tool calling (a weather tool that takes a city name), and show the chat in a React component. Save the API route to outputs/app/api/chat/route.ts and the component to outputs/app/chat/page.tsx.
evals.expected_output: AI SDK v6 code using streamText, toUIMessageStreamResponse, useChat with transport, inputSchema, no handleSubmit, no isLoading
